Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Tomorrow will finally be our last operation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}We've been through so much over the last half-year or so.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Haha, honestly though. You always seemed exhausted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Hey, it was way better than just doin' nothing, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}'Sides, we made some new friends![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Not a single thing we've done has been for nothing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It's been two and a half years since I got this power... And it's been worth it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Don't forget, we got to meet Koro-chan, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Still, two and a half years is a long time, Sanada-senpai...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh wait, it's been even longer for Aigis, hasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I was in stasis for much of that time, so I haven't been operational for very long.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}How 'bout you, Kirijo-senpai? You got your start before Sanada-san, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Of course, SEES wasn't around back then, and this was just a regular dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Did the chairman recruit you too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I've been aware of the Dark Hour since I was a child...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Once, my father's research team was ambushed by Shadows while they were investigating Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}When I witnessed the attack... I awakened to my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Apparently, I was the first ever to reliably control my Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...If that had never happened, then maybe none of you would be going through this right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Someone would've gotten involved, eventually. It's not like we could just ignore what the Shadows do to people.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}On the eve of the final Shadow, I can[n]feel a quiet passion from my friends...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I sense a strong bond with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Tomorrow is our last operation, so make sure to rest up tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
